video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. prop (mug_red_v1): state: on table, pressing half a photo, visually consistent. Close-up on red mug on table, Mug lifts to reveal half a photo underneath, Photo shows a kitchen from ten years ago. Narration: "红杯下面压着半张照片，照片里是十年前的厨房。". Protagonist A says: "这是我小时候的家？". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. Close-up of a red ceramic mug on a wooden kitchen table, mug lifts to reveal a worn half-photo underneath, photo shows a dimly lit kitchen from ten years ago, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic, film grain. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
video_prompt_keywords: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, red fridge, wooden table, rainy window, dim warm lamp + blue moonlight, mug_red_v1, Close-up on red mug on table, Mug lifts to reveal half a photo underneath, Photo shows a kitchen from ten years ago, Protagonist A says: "这是我小时候的家？", Close-up of a red ceramic mug on a wooden kitchen table, mug lifts to reveal a worn half-photo underneath, photo shows a dimly lit kitchen from ten years ago, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, film grain

negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, modern elements, bright colors, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
camera_motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S006/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
